The '''Zicx-bug bomb''' was a product manufactured by [[Goru Rainstealer]]. It was made up of living [[Zicx]], an [[Insect/Legends|insect]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] suspended in the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc's]] digestive fluid. It was a very powerful weapon, and required much skill in weapons technology to use. The weapon sported an explosive [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] shrapnel casing and employed a firing mechanism common to the bulk of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ordnance.
